chapter_title.ar: باب التَّعْقِيبِ بَعْدَ الصَّلَاةِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – The follow up after the Salāt and the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/178)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/178)
text: مَنْ سَبَقَتْ أَصَابِعُهُ لِسَانَهُ حُسِبَ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Al Hassan, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, by his chain, from Sama’at Bin Mihran,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one whose fingers move faster than his tongue, so (he will be) counted in his favour’.
en.sarwar: 21. Muhammad ibn al-Hassan has narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad through his chain of narrators from Sama‘ah ibn Mehran who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Whoever’ s fingers may move faster than his tongue it is counted in his favor (according to the movement of the former).”’
